creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Hiroo Ono from comment #28)

Hi Hiroo,

The fix looks correct to me. The problem is that zxing-cpp links to OpenCV improperly.
It is causing user code to link to OpenCV when this is not necessary.
I will commit a fix later today.
I've already updated the upstream pull request: https://github.com/glassechidna/zxing-cpp/pull/86

Yuri
